To disable debug breaks on high priority allocation page-in failures, run "?? dxgmms2!g_DemotedHighPriAllocDebugMode=1"
or "ed 0x%p 1"
To re-attempt the suspend attempt for debugging purposes, run "?? dxgmms2!g_DemotedHighPriAllocDebugMode=2"
or "ed 0x%p 2"

To re-attempt the failed paging packet execution for debugging purposes, run "?? dxgmms2!g_UnrecoverablePagingFailureDebugMode=2"
or "ed 0x%p 2"
To re-attempt the suspend attempt for debugging purposes, run "?? dxgmms2!g_UnrecoverablePagingFailureDebugMode=3"
or "ed 0x%p 3"
